title: [Bug]: Oracle disconnected replay regression must run inside the standard sink suite
summary: The focused Oracle Database disconnected replay verification regression imported the integration test module through a tests package path that is not guaranteed when scripts/check-sinks.sh collects the standard deterministic sink suite.
observed: The standalone focused regression passed, but scripts/check-sinks.sh failed during test collection with ModuleNotFoundError for tests.integration before reaching the container-backed disconnected replay checks.
expected: The regression should load the Oracle integration adapter deterministically from the repository path and must run as part of scripts/check-sinks.sh without requiring tests/ to be an importable package.
reproduction: Run scripts/check-sinks.sh after adding the Oracle disconnected replay verification regression to the deterministic sink suite.
failing_test: The standard sink check script itself is the failing regression: it collects the Oracle disconnected replay verification test and fails before executing the container-backed e2e gate.
impact: The defect blocks standard sink release validation and would prevent the new disconnected replay certification from being part of the normal local test gate.
delivery_semantics: This bug is limited to the test harness. Runtime sink delivery semantics are unchanged.
security: The bug report and comments must not include live database endpoints, credentials, generated passwords, container IDs, payloads, or private local paths.
acceptance: The Oracle disconnected replay verification regression loads the integration adapter without relying on tests/ as an importable package.
scripts/check-sinks.sh reaches and executes the deterministic sink suite successfully.
The container-backed Oracle MySQL Database, Oracle NoSQL Database, and Oracle Coherence Community Edition disconnected replay checks pass after the import fix.
Focused lint and formatting checks pass.
Sanitized test evidence is added to the managed issue.
tests: Rerun scripts/check-sinks.sh with the container e2e gate enabled after replacing the fragile test import. Also rerun the focused regression and static checks.
documentation: No public behavior documentation is expected. The latest test report should summarize the bug and validation result.
closeout: Mark completed after scripts/check-sinks.sh with container-backed e2e passes and the issue contains sanitized evidence.
